creator: murray@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Your content has been imported into the Developer's Handbook.  I'm 
sorry this took so long for me to get to.  All of our documentation is 
authored in DocBook SGML, and from there we convert it to HTML, 
PostScript, PDF, and many other formats automatically.  DocBook really 
isn't any more difficult to learn than HTML and it would be a huge 
help if you submit future documentation in DocBook.  Even if you can't 
though, submissions are greatly appreciated! 

http://www.FreeBSD.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/fdp-primer/ 

Thanks! 

- Murray
